AAPL.title: AAPL Faces Regulatory Scrutiny Over Data Practices
AAPL.description: Regulators announced a formal investigation into Apple Inc.'s data handling practices, potentially exposing the company to significant fines and operational restrictions.

AAPL.title: Institutional Investors Reduce AAPL Holdings by 8%
AAPL.description: SEC 13F filings reveal that major institutional investors trimmed their Apple Inc. positions significantly in the most recent quarter, suggesting diminished conviction in the near-term outlook.

AAPL.title: AAPL Smashes Earnings Expectations, Stock Surges 5.6%
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. reported Q1 earnings that beat analyst consensus by a wide margin, driven by strong revenue growth and expanding margins. Investors reacted positively, pushing shares higher in after-hours trading.

AAPL.title: AAPL Signs Partnership with Mid-Tier Technology Vendor
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. announced a partnership with a regional technology provider to enhance certain back-office capabilities. The financial terms were not disclosed and the impact on earnings is expected to be minimal.

AAPL.title: AAPL Holds Annual Shareholder Meeting; No Major Announcements
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. conducted its annual shareholder meeting with no material new announcements. Management reiterated existing guidance and outlined long-term strategic priorities consistent with prior communications.

AAPL.title: AAPL Cuts Full-Year Guidance Citing Macro Headwinds
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. lowered its full-year outlook, citing persistent macroeconomic headwinds including elevated interest rates and slowing enterprise spending. The guidance cut surprised most market observers.

AAPL.title: AAPL Appoints New Chief Marketing Officer
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. named a veteran marketing executive as its new Chief Marketing Officer. The appointment is seen as routine and consistent with the company's ongoing leadership succession planning.

AAPL.title: AAPL Completes Planned Debt Refinancing at Lower Rates
AAPL.description: Apple Inc. successfully refinanced a portion of its long-term debt at favorable rates, modestly reducing its interest expense. The transaction was in line with the company's stated capital allocation strategy.

NFLX.title: NFLX Appoints New Chief Marketing Officer
NFLX.description: Netflix Inc. named a veteran marketing executive as its new Chief Marketing Officer. The appointment is seen as routine and consistent with the company's ongoing leadership succession planning.

NFLX.title: Analysts Raise NFLX Price Target to $692
NFLX.description: A chorus of Wall Street analysts raised their price targets for Netflix Inc. following a strong product launch and positive channel checks. The consensus rating remains a Strong Buy.

NFLX.title: NFLX Signs Partnership with Mid-Tier Technology Vendor
NFLX.description: Netflix Inc. announced a partnership with a regional technology provider to enhance certain back-office capabilities. The financial terms were not disclosed and the impact on earnings is expected to be minimal.

NFLX.title: Analysts Raise NFLX Price Target to $730
NFLX.description: A chorus of Wall Street analysts raised their price targets for Netflix Inc. following a strong product launch and positive channel checks. The consensus rating remains a Strong Buy.
